# Glyphmill

> Glyphmill converts PNG letter images into installable TTF and WOFF2 fonts in the
> browser. Conversion runs client-side in WASM. Optional Claude agent tunes trace parameters.
> Generate — agentic glyph creation — is coming soon.

## Core pages

- / — product overview, proof strip, link to Export
- /how-it-works — full pipeline FAQ, three build paths, methodology
- /export — PNG upload, font generation, download TTF / WOFF2 / zip

## Deferred

- /generate — agentic glyph creation (not yet available)
